'''Paul Chadwick''' is an American comic-book creator. He provided art for the [[Wikipedia:Dazzler (Marvel Comics)|''Dazzler'']] comic book, published by [[Marvel Comics]], before creating his own character, [[Wikipedia:Concrete (comics)|Concrete]].

Chadwick has been recognized for his work with the [[Wikipedia:Eisner Award|Eisner Award]] for Best Writer/Artist in [[1989]], and nominations for the Harvey Awards for Best Artist, Writer, and Writer/Artist that same year. His work on Concrete has also won that series several awards.

Chadwick was also asked by [[Wikipedia:The Wachowskis|the Wachowskis]] (after having worked with them on several [[Wikipedia:The Matrix (franchise)|''The Matrix'']] comics) to be the writer of [[Wikipedia:The Matrix Online|''The Matrix Online'']]. Chadwick outlined the general story direction (and various natural offshoots) of events to take place in the [[MMORPG]] game.
